mapper.sql: id, schema_key, version, name, description, json_schema, java_type, created_from, status, locked, created_at, updated_at

where.if: and ( schema_key ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.insert: insert into schema_definition( schema_key, version, name, description, json_schema, java_type, created_from, status, locked ) values ( #{record.schemaKey}, #{record.version}, #{record.name}, #{record.description}, #{record.jsonSchema, typeHandler=com.myagent.common.repository.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{record.javaType}, #{record.createdFrom}, #{record.status}, #{record.locked} )
mapper.update: update schema_definition set name = #{record.name}, description = #{record.description}, json_schema = #{record.jsonSchema, typeHandler=com.myagent.common.repository.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, java_type = #{record.javaType}, updated_at = now() where id = #{record.id} and status = 'DRAFT' and locked = false
update schema_definition set status = 'ACTIVE', locked = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{schemaId}
